summary: Full E2E of UBC iteration-2. 13/13 backend pytest tests pass (undo, actions/recent, tags/summary, action-with-tag, milestone, patch settings, tasks CRUD, forgot/reset password, history CSV, week summary, X-Timezone, edit day). All 12 new frontend features verified via Playwright: keyboard shortcuts (A/D/U/1-9), undo button, streak ring+badge, projected finish, DoneDialog with tag, week recap, task checklist (add/toggle/delete + mode switching), history edit-day dialog + CSV export button + tags panel, forgot-password → reset-password → relogin with new password. Regression (register/onboard/dashboard/history/logout) still passes.
passed: F1 keyboard shortcuts: A increments added, D opens done-dialog, 1..9 sets step (verified '3'), U undo via header button
F2 undo-btn in header reverts last action
F3 streak-ring rendered; streak-badge appears when streak>0
F4 projected-finish pill appears after done history exists
F5 done-dialog with amount+tag records action; tags-panel visible on History
F6 edit-day-btn on hover -> edit-day-dialog -> POST /api/day updates row and counter (verified by pytest test_edit_day)
F7 Milestone: bulk done crossing 175 & 150 boundaries does not crash client (canvas-confetti fires)
F8 week-recap card renders with per-day heatmap
F9 export-csv-btn present, /api/history/csv returns 200 with text/csv
F10 Task mode toggle works: switching to list shows task-checklist; add/toggle/delete task work; switching back shows current-task-card
F11 X-Timezone header respected (verified via pytest with Pacific/Kiritimati)
F12 forgot-password → reset-password → login-with-new-password full flow; old token reuse rejected; unknown email returns 200 with no reset_link
critical_code_review_comments: server.py:474 has dead line `tz = get_tz` (references function, not called); harmless but should be removed or replaced with `_ = get_tz(request)`.
server.py: on_startup uses deprecated FastAPI on_event; not a bug but consider lifespan handlers.
Dashboard.jsx is ~594 lines — nearing the 700 line guideline; splitting into smaller components (Header, HeroCounter, Sidebar) would improve maintainability.
Settings popover doesn't close after selecting task mode — user has to press Escape/click outside. Minor UX polish.
test_credentials: Registered fresh users each run (ubc.iter2*@example.com / TestPass123). Password-reset test transitions to NewPass456/NewPass789.
seed_data_creation: None; tests self-provision users and clean up TEST_ prefixed tasks.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py — run with REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL env var set. All 12 iter-2 features verified end-to-end. Settings popover behavior: after clicking task-mode-*, popover stays open — Playwright scripts should press Escape or click body before interacting with task-checklist. forgot-reset-link testid wraps an <a> child; use `[data-testid="forgot-reset-link"] a` to get href.
